subject: style(themes): update Neon theme to cyan/coral palette
body:
Dark variant: cyan secondary (#22d3ee) + coral accent (#fb7185) for
a turquoise-complementary pairing. Light variant: teal accent (#0d9488)
to stay in the turquoise family while remaining readable on light bg.
